summary: Comprehensive testing of WaveWatch iteration 3 - Enhanced homepage (12+ sections), Admin panel (5 tabs), Achievements/Badges system, Leaderboard. Backend: 27/27 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Homepage Films Tendance section with 'Voir tout' link
Homepage Series Tendance section with 'Voir tout' link
/achievements redirects to /login for unauthenticated users (ProtectedRoute working)
/achievements shows 8 achievement badges when logged in
/leaderboard page loads with VIP Game Winners and Top Supporters sections
/actors page loads with TMDB popular persons
/music page loads with playlists and player
/history shows login prompt when not authenticated
Admin login with admin@wavewatch.com / WaveWatch2026! works
User menu shows: Tableau de bord, Mes favoris, Historique, Realisations, Mes playlists, Profil
User menu shows Administration link for admin users
Admin page has 5 tabs: Stats, Utilisateurs, Messages, Modules accueil, Salles cinema
Admin Stats tab shows user counts and statistics
Admin Modules tab shows Eye/EyeOff toggle icons for homepage sections
Admin Cinema rooms tab shows creation form with all fields
Contenu dropdown has: Films, Series, Animes, Sport, Documentaires, Spectacles, Collections, Acteurs
Medias dropdown has: Chaines TV, Radio FM, Musique, Retrogaming, Jeux
Backend API: GET /api/admin/cinema-rooms works (admin auth required)
Backend API: POST /api/admin/cinema-rooms creates room successfully
Backend API: DELETE /api/admin/cinema-rooms/{room_id} deletes room successfully
critical_code_review_comments: All 12+ homepage sections are implemented with proper data-testid attributes
Admin panel has all 5 tabs working correctly
Achievements system shows 8 badges with unlock status based on user activity
Leaderboard shows VIP Game Winners and Top Supporters
Cinema rooms CRUD operations work correctly with secrets.token_hex for room_id
Football calendar on homepage uses STATIC/HARDCODED data (by design)
Sport, Spectacles, Documentaires, Music, Games pages use STATIC data (by design)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 testing complete. All new features working: 12+ homepage sections with data-testid attributes, Admin panel with 5 tabs (Stats, Users, Messages, Modules, Cinema), Achievements/Badges system (8 badges), Leaderboard with VIP winners and top supporters. Cinema rooms API uses secrets.token_hex for room_id. Static data pages (Sport, Spectacles, Documentaires, Music, Games, Football Calendar) are working as expected.
mocked_apis_note: Sport, Spectacles, Documentaires, Music, Games pages and Football Calendar use STATIC/HARDCODED data (no backend API calls). This is by design per the requirements.
